---
title: "SORTEE Code Club"
format: html
---

## SORTEE Code Club

[Code club](https://www.google.com/imgres?q=code%20club&imgurl=https%3A%2F%2Fupload.wikimedia.org%2Fwikipedia%2Fcommons%2F0%2F06%2FCode_Club_logo.png&imgrefurl=https%3A%2F%2Fen.wikipedia.org%2Fwiki%2FCode_Club&docid=Tg64THRaWA7bFM&tbnid=KC936yBqQdk_dM&vet=12ahUKEwihqtT74MWUAxUXQ_EDHbEiIy8QnPAOegQIFBAB..i&w=200&h=200&hcb=2&ved=2ahUKEwihqtT74MWUAxUXQ_EDHbEiIy8QnPAOegQIFBAB)

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
